gitSafetyRules.description: Block commits containing API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, or sensitive credentials in added lines of code.
Sensitive or dependency files must not be committed unless they are intentionally tracked and safe.
Direct commits to protected branches such as main or master are not allowed.
Large binary files must not be committed directly. Git LFS must be used.
If the diff indicates possible credential exposure or sensitive information leakage, treat it as HIGH risk.
